visual_description: A man in a light-colored suit and glasses sits in a dimly lit room, holding a small, dark object in his hands. He looks at the object intently, then places it on a table. The camera cuts to a close-up of a gold Rolex watch on the table, then to a hand reaching for it.
audio_description: A low, sustained, and ominous musical tone plays throughout the clip, creating a suspenseful atmosphere.
